name: Running processes with cwd and cmdline
description: Linux collection: Running processes with cwd and cmdline
lines: for p in /proc/[0-9]*; do echo "=== $p ==="; ls -l "$p/exe" 2>/dev/null; tr '\0' ' ' < "$p/cmdline" 2>/dev/null; echo; done >> "$OUT/proc_cmdline.txt" 2>/dev/null

name: Forensics — shell history (all users)
description: Forensics — shell history (all users)
lines: find /home /root -name ".bash_history" -o -name ".zsh_history" 2>/dev/null | while read f; do echo "=== $f ===" >> "$OUT/shell_histories.txt"; cat "$f" >> "$OUT/shell_histories.txt" 2>/dev/null; done
